===================

=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Kingsford Smith Park
Seagulls Rugby League Football Club
Ballina, New South Wales, Australia
31 March 2001

Additional Soundmastering by Schubert

Disc 1
1. Announcement
2. Duncan And Brady (trad.)
3. My Back Pages
4. Desolation Row
5. Crash On The Levee (Down In The Flood)
6. I Want You
7. Seeing The Real You At Last
8. Tomorrow Is A Long Time
9. Gates Of Eden
10. It Ain't Me, Babe
11. Watching The River Flow

Disc2
1. The Wicked Messenger
2. Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat
3. Country Pie
4. Like A Rolling Stone
5. If Dogs Run Free
6. All Along The Watchtower
7. I Shall Be Released
8. Highway 61 Revisited
9. Blowin' In The Wind
10. Not Fade Away (Norman Petty/Charles Hardin)
11. Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35

Concert # 1299 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 9 of the 2001 Australian Tour. 2001 concert # 22.
Concert # 204 with the 12th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell
(guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), David Kemper (drums & percussion).
13, 7 9, 15, 17, 19 acoustic with the band.
2, 17 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
2 Larry Campbell (fiddle).
1, 17, 19 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).
Note. Band introduction during Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat like the one in Perth 18 March .
